raw_consumer_statement:
I have include a letter in the attachments that describes the entire description of the billing dispute on my " My Best Buy Credit Card ''. Please review that letter. This dispute has been open for more than 12 months and has been reopened a couple of times due to improper resolution. I have not been credited back properly. 

After mailing this letter and evidences to the Dispute Team, I received confirmation from Best Buy Via a Letter dated on XX/XX/year> that I will be issued merchant credit amount totaled to {$400.00} on a crediting date of XX/XX/year>. 

I had not received that merchant credit by XX/XX/year> so I called Best Buy Dispute customer service team, and they mentioned that the credit will be issued at the statement closing date and to call back on XX/XX/year> to check on the status. 

I called the Best Buy Dispute customer service team this morning on XX/XX/year> and they still are mentioning that they do not see a credit pending in the system and to try calling back on XX/XX/XXXX. 

As of now I have had no progress in getting this billing dispute resolved properly and need help.
